title: Phase 3: Relay subscription payments
description:
Monetize relay access via Zcash subscription payments. Wyoming LLC operator posture: we sell relay access, we cannot read messages.

Required:
- Payment watcher daemon: poll lightwalletd for incoming transactions to relay's merchant wallet
- Per-invoice address generation: each user gets a unique shielded address for their subscription
- Invoice TTL: invoices expire after 24h if unpaid, removed from DB
- Wire SubscribeRequest / SubscribeInvoice / SubscriptionActive relay messages
- set_subscription() already exists in Store — wire it to payment confirmations
- Alternative path: BTCPay Server integration (avoids implementing wallet logic in-house)

Decision needed before implementation: own wallet vs BTCPay Server.
